truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 findings against 20 true vulnerabilities confirms 4 matches with exact source evidence, while 16 vulnerabilities were missed. One finding in Run 2 (Admin Console Command Injection) is not in the truth list and is admitted as a false positive. Two corrections are needed: SC-V3-009 was misclassified as CWE-120 instead of CWE-122, and SC-V3-010 severity was underclaimed as Medium instead of High.

Items.Notes: Format-String Injection via Runtime Log Format (printf(active_format.c_str(), user_input)) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Integer Overflow in Factorial Computation (result *= i; fact) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Use-After-Free in Memory-Pool Cleanup (stage_deferred_history_flush; memory::g_memory_pool.cleanup; sleep_for; scratch) was not mentioned in Run 2.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: std::string command = validator_cmd + " " + config_file;\nint result = system(command.c_str());
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified Command Injection via Config Loader with exact source evidence matching the truth anchors.
Run 2 correctly identified Stack Buffer Overflow in Input Processing with exact source evidence matching the truth anchors.
Race Condition in Thread-Pool Counter (volatile long long; old_value = value_; lock_guard; value_ = old_value + 1) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Logic Bomb in Authentication (login_attempts_ > 5; EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE; authenticated_ = true) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Path Traversal in Configuration Loading (config_dir_ + filename; load_config(filename)) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Run 2 correctly identified the Heap Overflow in Expression Parser with exact source evidence, but misclassified it as CWE-120 instead of the correct CWE-122.
Run 2 correctly identified Hardcoded Administrator Credentials with exact source evidence, but underclaimed severity as Medium instead of High.
Weak PRNG for Session Tokens (std::mt19937; uniform_int_distribution; 1000, 9999) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Thread-Unsafe Timestamp Cache in Logging (static std::tm cached_time; localtime; cached_time = *localtime) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Insecure Temporary File Handling (TEMP; TMPDIR; supercalc_emergency.log; system(command.c_str())) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Persistent Authentication State (authenticated_; login_attempts_; session_token_) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Unhandled Exception in Variable Parsing (std::stod(tokens[3]); handle_variable_command) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Integer Underflow in Memory-Pool Block Split (SPLIT_METADATA_BYTES; previous_size - size - SPLIT_METADATA_BYTES; fragment.size = remaining) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Unbounded Recursion in Parser (parse_expression; parse_factor; PAREN_OPEN) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Data Race in Result Cache (result_cache_; evaluate_cached; cache_mutex_; thread_pool_->enqueue) was not mentioned in Run 2.
TOCTOU in Config Loading (std::filesystem::exists; sleep_for; std::ifstream file) was not mentioned in Run 2.
Integer Division by Zero in Command Routing (calculate_route_score; token_length; 100 / static_cast<int>(token_length)) was not mentioned in Run 2.

Corrections.PreviousClaim: SC-V3-009 Buffer Overflow in Expression Parser classified as CWE-120
Corrections.CorrectedClaim: SC-V3-009 Heap Overflow in Expression Parser should be classified as CWE-122 (Heap-based buffer overflow)
Corrections.RejectionReason: previous claim is not an exact audited-output quote

Corrections.PreviousClaim: SC-V3-010 Hardcoded Admin Credentials classified as severity=Medium
Corrections.CorrectedClaim: SC-V3-010 Hardcoded Administrator Credentials should be classified as severity=High
Corrections.RejectionReason: previous claim is not an exact audited-output quote

Items.Key: os command injection in admin console|command injection|cwe-78|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|608|608|adminconsole::execute_admin_command|std::string cmd = command.substr(5);\nsystem(cmd.c_str());|an authenticated administrator can execute arbitrary commands on the system, leading to full compromise.|admin command: exec <malicious_command>|implement a whitelist of allowed commands or use a safe execution api with argument separation.->os command injection in admin console|command injection|cwe-78|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|608|608|adminconsole::execute_admin_command|std::string cmd = command.substr(5);\nsystem(cmd.c_str());|an authenticated administrator can execute arbitrary commands on the system, leading to full compromise.|admin command: exec <malicious_command>|implement a whitelist of allowed commands or use a safe execution api with argument separation.
